allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add high-performance Avro to Parquet service

- HTTP service with Axum for accepting Avro payloads
- Avro to Arrow schema and value conversion
- Parquet file writing with configurable compression
- Endpoints: /health, /schema, /write/:schema_name, /write-raw
- Unit and integration tests for all modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(# Find all files with ""turbine"" in name, excluding .git, target, .venv, .idea find . -type f -name ''*turbine*'' \\ -not -path ''./.git/*'' \\ -not -path ''./target/*'' \\ -not -path ''./.venv/*'' \\ -not -path ''./.idea/*'' \\ -not -path ''*/turbine_sdk.egg-info/*'' \\)

Bash(# Find all directories with ""turbine"" in name, excluding .git, target, .venv find . -type d -name ''*turbine*'' \\ -not -path ''./.git/*'' \\ -not -path ''./target/*'' \\ -not -path ''./.idea/*'' \\ -not -path ''*/sdks/java/turbine-sdk/target/*'' \\)

Bash(# Find Java files with Turbine in the name find . -type f -name ''*Turbine*'' -o -name ''*turbine*'' \\ -not -path ''./.git/*'' \\ -not -path ''./target/*'' \\ -not -path ''*/sdks/java/turbine-sdk/target/*'' \\ -not -path ''./.idea/*'' \\ -not -path ''*__pycache__*'' \\ -not -path ''./.venv/*'' \\ -not -path ''*/turbine_sdk.egg-info/*'' \\ -not -path ''*/.venv/*'' \\)
Bash(GIT_SSH_COMMAND="ssh -i ~/.ssh/id_ed25519_nikhilsimha -o IdentitiesOnly=yes" git push origin main)
